name: ACL was set on accounts in administrators groups
definition: Windows Security Event ID 4780 records ACL was set on accounts in administrators groups.
trigger_scenarios: Windows logs the event when the audited security operation occurs.

key_fields.explanation: Object Name naming an administrators group and an Access Mask granting WRITE_DAC (0x40000) or WRITE_OWNER (0x80000) is delegated privilege persistence.
The initiating account and Logon ID support attribution and correlation to 4624 and 4688.
The affected host determines the operational impact.

false_positives: Documented maintenance, policy changes, or approved administration can generate this event.
Validate change control and host role before suppressing.
detection_notes: Object Name naming an administrators group and an Access Mask granting WRITE_DAC (0x40000) or WRITE_OWNER (0x80000) is delegated privilege persistence. This is a T1098 Account Manipulation signal; preserve the concrete value and correlate the actor, process, and related events.
kql_snippet:
SecurityEvent
| where EventID == 4780
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account
